series_metadata.series_description: Annual reimbursement provided to each chartered nonpublic school for the administrative and clerical costs incurred during the preceding school year. This includes form SF-240.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Five years, provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Paper: Five years, provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
